title: App-start sweep effect + group-open sweep + requestProfilesIfStale

design_decisions.rationale: Keeps the runner module free of marmot-ts/React imports; makes the function unit-testable with fake injections without mocking NDK or IndexedDB.

design_decisions.decision: Ref-backed once-only guard for app-start sweep
design_decisions.rationale: Mirrors the pattern used for profilePublishedRef (line 792 MarmotContext). A plain boolean ref prevents React re-renders from triggering duplicate sweeps when ready/groups/pubkeyHex change independently.

design_decisions.decision: requestProfilesIfStale(groupId) is a thin wrapper around sweepStaleProfiles
design_decisions.rationale: Single-group variant is pass-through; avoids duplicating the walk/staleness/dedup logic. The context value is fire-and-forget (void, not awaited) per AC-026.

design_decisions.decision: getGroupMembers uses the MLS state directly (getGroupMembers(mlsGroup.state))
design_decisions.rationale: The overlay store's memberPubkeys can lag MLS state after a commit lands. Using MLS state directly is the authoritative source, consistent with how subscribeToGroupMessages (line 521) syncs membership.

useEffect_locations.line: after setGroup(found) in the route-enter useEffect (approx line 124)
